repo_id.description: Woodpecker repository id (call list_repos first to discover it).

perPage.description: Max items per page. Default 50, max 100.

event.description: Filter by webhook event (push, pull_request, tag, manual, cron, deployment, release). Multiple values may be comma-separated.

status.description: Filter by pipeline status (success, failure, running, pending, killed, canceled, error, skipped, blocked, declined, created).

before.description: Only return pipelines created before this RFC3339 timestamp.

after.description: Only return pipelines created after this RFC3339 timestamp.
